summary: Iteration 34 - Agent Terrain Dashboard Sidebar Menu Testing COMPLETE. All 8 menu items verified. Visite ICI tab shows farmers with 'Visite ICI' buttons. ICI Profile Modal opens correctly from both AgentTerrainDashboard and FieldAgentsPage. Dashboard shows KPI cards, risk distribution, and recent activities. Suivi travail enfants tab shows children statistics and 'Fiche ICI' buttons.

issues: Genre and Education dropdowns show 'Choisir' and 'Niveau' placeholders - values not pre-selected even when profile exists (minor UX issue)
Console warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby={undefined}' for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: AgentTerrainDashboard.jsx has all 8 menu items correctly implemented with proper data-testid attributes (menu-dashboard, menu-ssrte, menu-ici, menu-members, menu-parcels, menu-photos, menu-children, menu-search)
MENU_ITEMS array (line 26-35) defines: Tableau de bord, Visites SSRTE, Visite ICI, Enregistrement membres, Declaration parcelles, Photos geolocalisees, Suivi travail enfants, Recherche planteur
Visite ICI tab correctly shows FarmersList component with 'Visite ICI' button label (line 366)
Suivi travail enfants tab shows children statistics and links to ICI forms (line 475 - 'Fiche ICI' button)
FieldAgentsPage.jsx shows 'Visite ICI' button in attribution modal (line 347) - correctly renamed from 'ICI'
ICIProfileModal opens correctly with farmer name in title, risk badge, children list with computed summary
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing data: Agent Kone Alphone has 2 assigned farmers (Balde ibo, Koffi). Balde ibo has 4 children in ICI profile.
